sentences.translation: Kad je Adnan pogriješio, prizno je grešku.
sentences.translationEn: When Adnan made a mistake he admitted his error.

sentences.arabic: اعْتَذَرَ لِمَنْ أَذَاهُ وَطَلَبَ مِنْهُ الْعَفْوَ.
sentences.translation: Ispričao se onome kome je naspudio i tražio oprost.
sentences.translationEn: He apologized to the one he harmed and asked for forgiveness.

sentences.translation: Rekao je: Priznavnje greške je od hrabrosti.
sentences.translationEn: He said: Admitting a mistake is a form of courage.

sentences.translation: Prijatelj mu je oprostio i rukovao se s njim.
sentences.translationEn: His companion forgave him and shook his hand.
